warm_up:
Activation & Mobilisation Drills:
1 round
30sec e/s PVC Shoulder Opener
10 Scap Pull Up
15 Plate I Y T
15 Plate Shoulder Press
15 Push Ups
30sec Cobra Stretch

strength.name: Bench Press
strength.description:
2x2 | * Slide the wheely chair back, Heels to floor
* Break the bar, pull bar apart
* Keep breathe in the whole rep | 24min
BUILD 5 Sets E3MOM
00:00 8 @ 50%
03:00 6 @ 60%
06:00 4 @ 70%
09:00 2 @ 80%
12:00 2 @ 85-90%
HOLD 2 Sets E4MOM
16:00 2 @ 95%
20:00 2 @ 95%

metcon.name: Workout
metcon.description:
3RFT 12min cap
12 Cal Assault Bike
10 Russian KB Swings 24/16
8 Burpees
10 Walking Lunges
12 T2B

gymnastics:
Pull-ups: E2MOM 10 min
Max Reps (aim to keep the same reps throughout each set)
Aim for 1 more rep than last week

hypertrophy.reasoning: Bench and metcon heavily tax chest, triceps, and lower body; accessory work targets opposing/secondary muscles for balanced development.

siri_text: Tuesday's workout. Strength: Bench Press, 2 by 2 at 95 percent. Gymnastics: Pull-ups: E2MOM 10 min. Metcon: Workout: 12 Cal Assault Bike, 10 Russian KB Swings 24/16, 8 Burpees, 10 Walking Lunges, 12 T2B. For hypertrophy, focus on rear delts, back thickness, biceps.
